title: LIS-001 INSPECT CLIA User Manual version 1.0
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"7oh6p","text":"Document Title: INSPECT CLIA User Manual","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"f7hd3","text":"Document No. LIS-001","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9jf11","text":"Document version: 1.0","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1f7a5","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bdiio","text":"User guide for the INSPECT (Instant Service Platform for Emergency COVIDTests) CLIA LIS application for use by EXCITE (Expedited COVID IdenTification Environment) Lab.  ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ds170","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"32nfe","text":"INSPECT is a companion LIS to testing performed with Thermo Fisher or Perkin Elmer testing testing kits.  Workflows and procedures differ for each kit.  Please refer to the corresponding test kit lab documents when using INSPECT and this guide.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3vgnc","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7dn10","text":"Sections are divided into end user application use and admin setup and maintenance.  Please refer to lab documents for details on lab testing processes.  Only trained users will be given access to the INSPECT system.  Please contact an Admin user and lab supervisor to set up a login and user training.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ddjv5","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4nn8","text":"Admin use is restricted to users granted access to administer the INSPECT application and access to AWS services.  Please contact an Admin and AWS support staff as applicable for access to admin functions.  Use is restricted to individuals trained on admin functions.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
creator: Shashank Sathe
